title: Pebble's Party API
description: Party API that supports party management and party chat. Intended for mods that require a party functionality.
body:
# Pebble's Party API

Add party with simple HUD for viewing/managing party.

## Commands:
- /party chat <message>
- /party create
- /party disband
- /party invite <player>
- /party menu
- /party kick <player>
- /party transferOwner <player>
- /party leave
